subject: LU-12662 tests: Add new pjdfstest into tests

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This test failed both of the pjdfstest runs.  The ZFS test failed with:

 CMD: trevis-65vm4 zfs get -H -o value lustre:svname   -mdt1/mdt1
 no label for -mdt1/mdt1

and the other ended with:

 CMD: onyx-33vm3 e2label /dev/mapper/ost6_flakey 2>/dev/null
 CMD: onyx-33vm3 cat /proc/mounts
 CMD: onyx-33vm3 e2label /dev/mapper/ost7_flakey 2>/dev/null
 CMD: onyx-33vm3 cat /proc/mounts

Maybe this patch depends on some test-framework.sh changes that are not in b2_12?

Patch Set 1:

I will take a look and run it on b2_12 branch

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Patch Set 1:

What patch(es) do we need to back port to get the changes to the init_test_env() changes to get this patch to work? 

Maybe we should back port those changes for this patch and, possibly, for others so that they port easier.

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

Hi James,
I think the patch may need back ported is 
https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/34863/3
This patch has the config file(NAME) and other parameters imported in init_test_env
Uploaded patch set 2.

parents.subject: LU-13949 build: add autogen.sh into distribution tarball

commit.subject: LU-12662 tests: Add new pjdfstest into tests
commit.message:
LU-12662 tests: Add new pjdfstest into tests

Create a new POSIX test suite based on pjdfstest.

This is a back port from
Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/35841
Lustre-commit: 414e613c2da55e6b8d2b3b20cbfb340cd84c9854

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: fstype=ldiskfs testlist=pjdfstest
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=pjdfstest

Change-Id: Iec37e2248ce5ccf89319aaffb3ead9b407ad1931
Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <sarah@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/38653
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
